## Versioning note

> Per the [versioning philosophy](../../docs/versioning.md), **any new functionality triggers a new major version**. Consumers must explicitly update their workflow files to adopt it.

Is this backwards-compatible with existing consumer workflows?

- [ ] Yes — existing workflows continue to work unchanged (new optional input/output)
- [ ] No — existing workflows would need updating (new required input, removed/renamed input, changed default)
